An AI-native personal finance advisor that unifies all of your scattered financial data—bank accounts, investments, credit scores, EPF and more—into a single, secure feed. By exposing that normalized data to any large language model (like Gemini), it delivers truly personal insights.

We're building a tool that transforms natural language descriptions of multi-agent systems into executable code by converting them into precise LTL specifications using large language models. This tool enables users to observe, interact with, and control the dynamic behaviors of interconnected agents through reactive synthesis techniques.

AI Chatbot Agent is a powerful, modular AI assistant that combines intelligent conversation with AI-powered image generation. Built with modern Python tools like FastAPI, Streamlit, and LangGraph, it allows users to chat with large language models, generate creative visuals from text prompts, and even enhance responses using real-time web search
An interactive agent for retail data analysis. Upload a CSV, ask questions in natural language, and get insights and visualizations powered by a large language model.
A Python-based application that simulates a realistic job interview using AI-powered agents. The system leverages CrewAI and large language models to conduct mock interview.

An Agentic AI-powered mock interview application that generates role-specific interview questions, evaluates candidate responses, provides structured feedback, and assigns performance ratings using Large Language Models.

This Streamlit application implements a Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system. It processes various types of documents including text files, PDFs, PowerPoint presentations, and images. The app leverages Large Language Models and Vision Language Models to extract and index information from these documents.

End-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) workflow/agents for cezzis.com cocktails. Built with Python, Qdrant, Ollama, sourced from an Azure Cosmos DB, and TEI with intfloat/e5-base-v2 for embeddings. Provides a REST API for semantic search and conversational Q&A over cocktail data using advanced embeddings and large language models.
topics: qdrant, rag, tei, ollama, api, text-embeddings, intfloat-e5-base-v2

description: A Multi-Agent Decision Intelligence System for Optimization under Uncertainty takes an engineering problem as input, analyzes related documents to extract key information, and uses AI agents and large language models to build and refine optimization models, delivering efficient and interpretable solutions for complex engineering challenges.

An AI-powered agent framework built in Python, designed to simplify the creation of intelligent assistants by combining large language models with customizable tools, prompts, and secure API integration.

Python code to implement HeRoN, a multi-agent architecture combining Reinforcement Learning and Large Language Models to create NPCs with strategic, adaptive, and context-aware behaviors in turn-based battles.
topics: large-language-models, non-player-character, reinforcment-learning, videogame

description: This project showcases how to leverage Google's ADK (Agent Development Kit) and MCP (Model Context Protocol) to build an agent powered by Gemma 3, Google's latest large language model. It demonstrates how to:  Connect to locally-hosted Gemma 3 via Ollama Implement YouTube search functionality using MCP.
This is a toy large language model agent that can safely read and write to files in a working directory. It's the product of a tutorial series on boot.dev

An intelligent agent that automates web research by searching for information, extracting content from top sources, and generating structured, professional reports using Large Language Models. Built for the GUVI AI Hackathon.

This project demonstrates an intelligent AI agent built using LangGraph that can dynamically select and call multiple tools via the MCP (Multi-Call Protocol). The agent integrates asynchronous execution, external APIs, and large language models (Groq) to process user queries efficiently.
topics: mcp

description: Aletheia is an experimental framework for building a self-reflective agent — a system capable of persistent memory, internal monologue, and dialogue with a large language model as an external source of metacognition.

Benchmarking whether Small Language Models can replace Large Language Models in agentic AI tasks using a co-designed router and memory system. Includes a support ticket agent, routing logic, structured outputs, and full evaluation of cost, quality, and latency tradeoffs across multiple configurations.

Visara, an agentic AI system for internet outage reporting, utilizing large language models and multi-agent workflows to autonomously analyze and contextualize outage events, bridging technical network data with social and geopolitical context. Associated with the Internet Intelligence Lab at Georgia Tech.

A practical implementation of AIXI using Large Language Models. This project was meant to explore the creation of agentic structures from scratch. To stay fundamental, itexplores how many deviations from Hutter's ideal universal agent are necessary to create a functional system.

This is the corresponding paper An adaptive task decomposition framework for complex construction projects based on large language models The fine-grained decomposition method and the code project of the main agent are presented.

StockAgent is a multi-agent AI system that uses large language models to simulate investor behavior and stock trading in environments that closely resemble real financial markets. The project is motivated by the need to understand how external factors such as macroeconomic conditions, policy changes, company fundamentals,and global events influence

This project implements a customer support triage system using AI and semantic search technology. It defines an agent (SupportTriageAgent) that integrates large language models, sentiment and intent analysis tools, and embeddings for handling support ticket data.

Gen AI Agents Playing Mafia Game. This repository contains a simple web app for playing a Mafia game where all the players are AI agents powered by large language models. The frontend is written in vanilla JavaScript and the backend is a small Flask server that orchestrates the game logic.

Explainable X is an AI-powered Python programming assistant desktop application that uses large language models to help users develop Python projects. Through a graphical interface, users can interact with AI agents to generate code, modify files, manage projects, and more.

A powerful research assistant that leverages Large Language Models to provide technically-focused, well-researched answers with robust citations. Built on a graph-based architecture, the agent drafts answers, performs critical self-reflection, conducts research, and iteratively improves responses based on discovered information.

This repository contains multiple AI projects built using modern large language models, vector search, automation pipelines, and deep learning frameworks. Each project demonstrates practical applications of AI such as chatbots, document analysis, agents, and intelligent automation, with clean architecture and reusable components.

PromptShot is a multi-phase adversarial attack pipeline designed for red-teaming modern Large Language Models. Combining multi-agent jailbreak generation, system-prompt poisoning, persona hijacking, and adaptive guardrail evasion to bypass the strongest alignment defenses used by today’s frontier models.

LangChain is a framework for building applications powered by large language models. It simplifies development with open-source components and LangGraph for stateful agents, supports monitoring and evaluation through LangSmith, and enables deployment as production-ready APIs and Assistants via LangGraph Platform.

Auto-Cursor is a GUI-native orchestration layer that pilots the Cursor IDE like a human operator. By combining large language models, visual grounding, and deterministic automation, the project explores how agents can build software without being confined to command-line tooling.

An autonomous multi-agent system built with CrewAI that performs structured financial research and analysis on companies. It uses large language models and integrated search tools to gather company data, analyse performance, summarise recent news, and generate polished financial reports with clear insights and outlooks.

SHARVA (Systematic High-performance Artificial Response Virtual Agent) is an advanced AI assistant with dual functionality, offering both a general-purpose mode for everyday tasks and a specialized security mode for cybersecurity professionals. This Python-based tool leverages large language models through Groq's API to deliver intelligent, context

AI-Powered Keynote Presentation Automation using Model Context Protocol (MCP)  Advanced MCP server that bridges Large Language Models with Apple Keynote, enabling AI agents to perform computations and add the results to a keynote through natural language commands. Features 21+ mathematical tools, Google Gemini 2.0 Flash integration,

Chat PDF Agent — AI Chatbot for PDFs with Perplexity API and LangChain An interactive Streamlit app to upload multiple PDF files, create a vector store with local sentence-transformer embeddings, and ask detailed questions using the Perplexity API large language model. Enables context-aware conversational search over documents.

The Mental Health AI Agent is a conversational assistant that provides users with mental health support grounded in verified psychological practices and curated content. It leverages large language models and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to deliver accurate, contextual responses tailored to mental wellness topics such as stress, burnout etc

WebPilot AI is a sophisticated, AI-powered browser automation tool. It uses a large language model to interpret natural language instructions and translate them into browser actions, allowing it to perform complex web-based tasks autonomously. The agent's actions are streamed in real-time and recorded for later review.

This Streamlit application is a powerful AI-driven tool that helps users solve math problems and look up general knowledge using the Gemma 2 large language model via Groq. It combines multiple capabilities such as math reasoning, arithmetic calculation, and Wikipedia-based information search—all integrated through LangChain agents and tools.

A fully autonomous, AI-driven workflow that fetches papers from arXiv, uses local Large Language Models for summarization and quality review, and presents the results in a clean, interactive web UI.

FlowBot is an AI-driven automation framework that combines large language models, computer vision (YOLO), and deep learning for intelligent task execution. It can analyze data, process images, communicate through APIs, and manage workflows autonomously — all within a flexible, extensible architecture powered by Django and Ollama.
